'''Cazne'olan''' was a [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] and was one of the leaders of the [[Olan Clan]] in the city of [[Kala'uun/Legends|Kala'uun]] on [[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]].

==Biography==
An aged, thickset [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] male with thin [[Lekku/Legends|lekku]] and wrinkled pink skin, Olan was a contemporary of [[Nawara Ven]] and [[Koh'shak]]. He despised what his cousin [[Firith Olan]] had become and, when Firith came to him for shelter, made plans to sell his relative to the highest bidder. Cazne'olan orchestrated a negotiation between [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] and [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Marl Semtin/Legends|Marl Semtin]], forcing [[Rogue Leader/Legends|Rogue Leader]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] and [[Winter Celchu|Winter]] to battle [[Sixtus Quin]] and [[Septaas]] for information on Firith's and [[Eidolon Base]]'s whereabouts.<ref name="BT">[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 11|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 11]]</ref>

However, Cazne'olan showed that he believed crime did not pay—either for Firith or the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]—by staging the battle in a [[virtual reality]] environment, in which all parties were consumed in a [[heat storm]]. The Empire came out the victor in the virtual game, with Sixtus securing the prize. However, Semtin secretly bribed his way into the upper levels of [[Kala'uun/Legends|Kala'uun]] and took Firith, presumably without paying Cazne'olan his promised fee.<ref name="BT" />

Later, Cazne'olan was reunited with Antilles during Rogue Squadron's mission to procure [[ryll kor]] to aid in the fight against the [[Krytos virus]]. With a sense of mutual respect between the two from their earlier encounter, Cazne'olan supported Antilles in his negotiation with [[Kala'uun Starport]] master [[Koh'shak]], and in the ensuing ''[[twi'janii]]'', answered the squadron leader's questions on Twi'lek culture and conveyed to him the dancer [[Sienn'rha]]'s offer of a private dance.<ref name="TKT">''[[X-Wing: The Krytos Trap]]''</ref>
